CustomField.label: Capacity
CustomField.description: The enforceable per-slot published capacity ceiling required by REQ-008 ("that slot's published capacity"). Populated by VS-06's even-distribution algorithm (D-023/A-005) such that sum(VS_Capacity__c) across a session's slots equals VS_Session__c.VS_Bookable_Capacity__c. Checked (never exceeded) by VS_BookingService.book() (VS-09) inside the parent session's SELECT ... FOR UPDATE lock (D-019/D-020) -- not enforced by this object alone.
